entities.name: Modular Scripts
entities.context: Design principle for self-contained scripts with CLI arguments, exit codes, and dry-run mode

entities.name: Extension Points
entities.context: Pattern for adding new subsystems to N5 through schemas, scripts, commands, and documentation

entities.name: N5
entities.context: System architecture with schemas, scripts, commands, and config directories

entities.name: dry-run mode
entities.context: Safety technique included in modular scripts for testing without side effects

relationships.context: Modular scripts are a design pattern governing N5/scripts/
Extension points define the process for extending N5 subsystems
Dry-run mode is a required feature of modular scripts
